g.text: "Turned Back at the First Air Bell"
"Turned Back at the Second Air Bell"
"Turned Back at the Third Air Bell"
"Turned Back at the Gallery of Coffers"
"Turned Back at the Fourth Air Bell"
"Turned Back at the Last Air Bell"
"Turned Back at the Vault of the Serpent"
"Out With Your Life, Not the Hoard"
"Two Seals and the Long Climb Out"
Slip under the surface and go down.
Slide through the clear gap on the stead...
Grab the grate bars to slow yourself.
Push wide into the still corner.
Kick down hard to beat the funnel.
Hold at the mouth until the pull eases.
Gamble it and take the harder line.
Give it up and turn back for the surface...
Feel down the wall and keep the silt sti...
Kick down the stairwell to save time.
Pull down by the old handrail.
Wave the lamp to cut the murk.
Settle and wait for the silt to clear.
Gamble it and take the harder line.
Give it up and turn back for the surface...
Cross in the slack eddy beside the pour.
Ride the fast pour straight through the ...
Climb over the top of the weir.
Dive the sump under the weir.
Hold at the weir to time the pour.
Gamble it and take the harder line.
Give it up and turn back for the surface...
Keep to the sound wall to the seal.
Force the door with your bar.
Dive the flooded pit to look under.
Hold in the chamber to study the lock.
Gamble it and take the harder line.
Give it up and turn back for the surface...
Prise the serpent seal free and carry it...
Leave the seal; the water is rising.
Rise slow and breathe the clean center.
Gulp the nearest air at the rim.
Punch up fast through the surface.
Break the rot to widen the pocket.
Linger in the pocket to rest.
Gamble it and take the harder line.
Give it up and turn back for the surface...
Breathe the bell to the full.
Press on with the breath you have.
Take the long submerged push through.
Feel along the throat wall as you go.
Rise partway to look for a bubble.
Force it in a thrash of panic.
Ride the centerline to the open door.
Cut through the niches to shorten the ha...
Make for the second door on the side.
Rise to the ceiling to skim the hall.
Hang in the current and read the hall.
Gamble it and take the harder line.
Give it up and turn back for the surface...
Follow the warmer seam to the far lip.
Drop into the cold to cross straight.
Work the frozen rim of the sump.
Sprint across to beat the chill.
Tread the sump to gather nerve.
Gamble it and take the harder line.
Give it up and turn back for the surface...
Walk the iron ribs to the door.
Cross straight over the coffer lids.
Swing across by the ceiling hooks.
Lever the seal before you reach it.
Stand on a lid and plan the crossing.
Gamble it and take the harder line.
Give it up and turn back for the surface...
Prise the serpent seal free and carry it...
Leave the seal; the water is rising.
Slip the thin left edge of the curtain.
Push straight through the main sheet.
Take the curtain at the near right edge.
Wait for the curtain to slacken.
Gamble it and take the harder line.
Give it up and turn back for the surface...
Breathe the bell to the full.
Press on with the breath you have.
Take the long submerged push through.
Sprint the coil to beat your breath.
Force it in a thrash of panic.
Take the long way and leave the sluice s...
Wedge the wheel to hold the gap open.
Stop at the fork to weigh the two ways.
Gamble it and take the harder line.
Give it up and turn back for the surface...
Keep to the true aisle between the rows.
Cut across the side bays to save length.
Pull along the pillars hand over hand.
Rise into the vault to cross above.
Hold at the nave door and count the rows...
Gamble it and take the harder line.
Give it up and turn back for the surface...
Follow the knotted guide-rope post to po...
Let the rope go and swim straight.
Cut between the columns to shortcut the ...
Race the rope hand over hand.
Stop on the rope to get bearings.
Gamble it and take the harder line.
Give it up and turn back for the surface...
Take the clear channel to the high point...
Cross the broken field straight to the a...
Drag yourself low across the rubble.
Breathe at the near edge of the dome.
Hold below and study the safe channel.
Gamble it and take the harder line.
Give it up and turn back for the surface...
Breathe the bell to the full.
Press on with the breath you have.
Take the long submerged push through.
Stop to try a coffer on the way.
Drop low to shorten the run.
Force it in a thrash of panic.
Thread the clear lane and touch nothing.
Pull a strongbox aside to widen the way.
Climb over the top of the stacks.
Pause to pick the safest line.
Gamble it and take the harder line.
Give it up and turn back for the surface...
Go down the whole center to the seal.
Steady yourself on the wall shelves.
Pry the seal loose with both hands.
Dive the deep to look for a lower door.
Hold before the seal to steady your nerv...
Gamble it and take the harder line.
Give it up and turn back for the surface...
Prise the serpent seal free and carry it...
Leave the seal; the water is rising.
Follow the guide-chain to the outflow.
Let the chain go and swim across.
Dive below the chain for the outflow.
Gamble it and take the harder line.
Give it up and turn back for the surface...
Hold the clear bore through the middle.
Push through the swaying cables direct.
Skirt the run along the wall.
Stop to cut a fouled cable clear.
Hold at the mouth to read the cables.
Gamble it and take the harder line.
Give it up and turn back for the surface...
Climb the chimney square and slow to the...
Climb the chimney fast to reach air.
Chimney up with your back on the slick w...
Kick off the walls to shoot up the chimn...
Rest partway up the chimney to gather st...
Gamble it and take the harder line.
Give it up and turn back for the surface...
Breathe the bell to the full.
Press on with the breath you have.
Take the long submerged push through.
You have no breath left; there is nothin...
Charge the throat and hope to clear it.
Feel your way slow to be sure of the lin...
Force it in a thrash of panic.
Breathe quick at the sound end and go.
Breathe under the cracked middle of the ...
Take a long slow breath to fill complete...
Prop the slab before you breathe.
Wait under the slab to steady before the...
Gamble it and take the harder line.
Give it up and turn back for the surface...
Breathe the bell to the full.
Press on with the breath you have.
Lift the hoard straight up off the plint...
Slide the hoard off the side.
Sweep the whole plinth clear at once.
Pry the plinth for what lies beneath.
Linger to be sure of the take.
Gamble it and take the harder line.
Give it up and turn back for the surface...
Pass quick under the sound springing of ...
Pass under the cracked crown for the sho...
Prop the shifting stone before you pass.
Climb the arch to cross above it.
Wait for the groaning to settle.
Gamble it and take the harder line.
Give it up and turn back for the surface...
Climb the whole outer edge of the spiral...
Cut up the inside of the spiral.
Jump the broken flight to the landing.
Push straight up the flooded shaft.
Rest on a step and let the burn ease.
Gamble it and take the harder line.
Give it up and turn back for the surface...
Make for the high overflow arch.
Take the nearest low door out.
Dive down to find the drain plug.
Slip a side gap under the rising line.
Tread water and wait for the level to st...
Gamble it and take the harder line.
Give it up and turn back for the surface...
Part the dead growth at the thin place.
Force straight through the living weed.
Knife a new gap through the curtain.
Rise over the top of the curtain.
Hold at the curtain to find a way.
Gamble it and take the harder line.
Give it up and turn back for the surface...
Go flat and slip the gap on the surge.
Push the gap full-chested and strong.
Thrash hard to force straight through.
Keep the gear on and squeeze anyway.
Wait at the choke for a wider surge.
Gamble it and take the harder line.
Give it up and turn back for the surface...
Hold at the channel to read the flow.
Gamble it and take the harder line.
Give it up and turn back for the surface...
Swim the clear upper water the length of...
Follow the floor to keep your bearings.
Push through the thickest rust for the s...
Try a side passage out of the rust.
Hold in the gallery to let the rust sett...
Gamble it and take the harder line.
Give it up and turn back for the surface...
Rise beside the jammed car in the clear.
Go up through the open car.
Climb the old lift cable to the top.
Wait beside the car to plan the rise.
Gamble it and take the harder line.
Give it up and turn back for the surface...
Rise steady and hold the stop partway.
Blow straight to the top for the air.
Skip the stop to beat the flood.
Try a side vent to shortcut the shaft.
Hang in the shaft to gather for the top.
Gamble it and take the harder line.
Give it up and turn back for the surface...
Three seals turn: the door swings full w...
Two seals turn: the door grinds half ope...
One seal bites: the door gives a hand-wi...
No seal turns: the door holds against yo...
Set your shoulder and force the mechanis...
The low port still runs dry: carry the h...
The surge drowned the low port: only the...
Chance the drowned port with the hoard a...
Breath to spare: rise easy with the hoar...
Little breath left: haul up gasping but ...
Empty your rig and swim it blind and fas...
Take what the half door allows.
The low way is dry: slip out through it.
The low way is drowned: the flood has cl...
Wedge the half door wider by main force.
Reach the sally-cord through the gap.
The sally-way runs dry: haul yourself ou...
The sally-way is drowned: the flood took...
Force your shoulder through the hand-wid...
Dive for the flood-drain with the last o...
Batter the sealed door as the water clim...
